title: Cleanup, Partial Initialization, and Error Paths · C Contract Brief: Goto Cleanup Discipline
summary: A configuration loader acquires buffers, files, locks, and parsed objects before failures at each stage. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem goto cleanup discipline increment in failure-atomic resource constructor. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use structured goto cleanup when it centralizes unwinding without skipping initialization or obscuring ownership.
Release acquired resources in dependency-safe reverse order with idempotent or guarded cleanup.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Goto Cleanup Discipline · Theory Goto Cleanup Discipline
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory native-systems team handles memory case 4389. Produce bounded C evidence to unwind partially acquired resources in reverse order; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Use structured goto cleanup when it centralizes unwinding without skipping initialization or obscuring ownership.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Goto Cleanup Discipline contract for the supplied data.

steps.title: Build Goto Cleanup Discipline evidence · Theory Goto Cleanup Discipline
steps.instruction:

It must unwind partially acquired resources in reverse order, reject one changed boundary, print an observable result and invariant, and return nonzero when the invariant fails.
